<!-- cyberwiki/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md -->

---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect or malfunction
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

# Description

Provide a concise, technically focused description of the bug, including the observed behavior and how it diverges from the expected behavior.

# Reproduction

List the minimal steps required to reproduce the issue, including commands, configuration snippets, and any relevant environment details.

# Expected behavior

Describe the correct, non-fictional behavior that should occur under the same conditions, referencing applicable documentation sections where possible.

# Additional context

Include logs, traces, or references to CyberWiki entities if they help clarify the problem.
